selection_policy: Retain all 12 author-reported whole-rock basalt samples; exclude reference materials and blanks. Require SiO2 40-55 wt%, positive complete common18, and harmonized major total 90-105 wt%.
fe_harmonization: Use FEOT = 0.8998 * author-reported Fe2O3T. The supplementary table also provides the same derived FeOT values, enabling a direct conversion check.
independence_scope: One publication-linked province proxy comprising 12 samples dredged at four locations. Publication and exact sample-name overlap are audited against the PetDB training table; broad geographic overlap alone is not sample leakage.
